name: Creamy Ham and Pasta
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cup Uncooked Bow Tie Or Rotini Pasta (7 Oz)
6 oz Turkey ham, sliced thin & cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook pasta to desired doneness. Add frozen peas to the last 6 minutes of cooking time, and add the ham to the last 1 minute of cooking time. Drain; return to pan.
2. In a small bowl with a wire whisk, combine the softened cream cheese and milk; stir into hot cooked pasta mixture. Cook and stir over medium-low heat 1-2 minutes or just until thoroughly heated.
Servings: 4 (1 1/4 cup) servings
Source: Pillsbury Fast and Healthy Magazine, March/April 1993
Each serving contains 3 breads, 1 1/2 proteins, 1 fat
Per serving: 370 cal.
